title: Checkbox in Wrong Location for True/False on Forms
excerpt: Forms > True/False field: I’ve never seen the checkbox following a consent.  The checkbox should be located before the description in this use case. I’m not sure of a use case that would have a blank to the right of t…

posts.author: bgordon83 (Ben Gordon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2025-07-15 at 12.49.33 PM1272×304 31.8 KB

Forms > True/False field: I’ve never seen the checkbox following a consent. The checkbox should be located before the description in this use case. I’m not sure of a use case that would have a blank to the right of the checkbox for True/False. Or user should be able to text that comes after the checkbox.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bgordon83

In our monday form builder app Easyform, we show the checkbox before the question label.

Additionally, we support embedding and collapsible Terms and Conditions on your form. Please check out our How-To page here.

You can check out or documentation here, if you want help setting up or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.
